content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.nature.com/articles/s41522-023-00386-4.pdf", "source_title": "Intermittent fasting modulates the intestinal microbiota and improves obesity and host energy metabolism", "source_type": "journal_article", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Here, 72 Chinese volunteers with a wide range of body mass index (BMI) participated in a three-week IF program during which an average loss...", "direct_quote": "Here, 72 Chinese volunteers with a wide range of body mass index (BMI) participated in a three-week IF program during which an average loss of 3.67 kg body weight accompanied with improved clinical parameters was observed irrespective of initial anth", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "To treat obesity and prevent associated diseases, different types of interventions have been applied and studied, including surgery,...", "direct_quote": "To treat obesity and prevent associated diseases, different types of interventions have been applied and studied, including surgery, medication, exercise, and fasting.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "As one strategy of fasting, intermittent fasting (IF) has shown consistent performance in relation to weight loss and relevant clinical...", "direct_quote": "As one strategy of fasting, intermittent fasting (IF) has shown consistent performance in relation to weight loss and relevant clinical improvements, attracting public attention in recent years 6 .", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from Intermittent fasting modulates the intestinal microbiota and."}]}
